NY629KA

New York City Transfer System B.M.T. Division Transfer Token · Section 629

Listed in Atwood-Coffee Catalog Transit Token Bronze Round Solid 22 mm

Separate A/C listing described as an error and never used. Catalog exception; not a minor die variety of NY629K.
